allow: Bash(composer install:*)
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8888/)
Bash(netstat -ano)
Bash(findstr 8888)
Bash("D:/MariaDB/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -proot -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3306 -e "SELECT 1")
Read(//d/MariaDB/bin/**)
Bash(curl -s -w "\\nHTTP_CODE:%{http_code}" http://localhost:9999/)

Bash("D:/MariaDB/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -proot normandie_drupal_d10 -e "SELECT name, data FROM config WHERE name IN \(''system.site'', ''system.file'', ''update.settings'', ''xmlsitemap.settings''\);")
Bash("D:/MariaDB/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -proot normandie_drupal_d10 -e "SELECT name FROM config LIMIT 10;")
Bash("D:/MariaDB/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -proot normandie_drupal_d10 -e "SELECT name FROM config WHERE data LIKE ''%cheque%'' OR data LIKE ''%normandie%'' OR data LIKE ''%46.18%'';")
Bash("D:/MariaDB/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -proot normandie_drupal_d10 -e "SELECT name, CONVERT\(data USING utf8\) as data FROM config WHERE name = ''system.site'';")
Bash("D:/MariaDB/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -proot normandie_drupal_d10 -e "SELECT name, CONVERT\(data USING utf8\) as data FROM config WHERE name = ''addtoany.settings'';")
Bash("D:/MariaDB/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -proot normandie_drupal_d10 -e "SELECT name, CONVERT\(data USING utf8\) as data FROM config WHERE name = ''cartochantier.settings'';")

Bash("D:/MariaDB/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -proot normandie_drupal_d10 -e "SELECT entity_id, SUBSTRING\(body_value, 1, 500\) FROM node__body WHERE body_value LIKE ''%cheque-eco-energie%'' OR body_value LIKE ''%normandie%'' LIMIT 10;")

Bash("D:/MariaDB/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -proot normandie_drupal_d10 -e "SELECT entity_id, SUBSTRING\(body_value, 1, 500\) FROM block_content__body WHERE body_value LIKE ''%cheque-eco-energie%'' OR body_value LIKE ''%normandie%'' LIMIT 10;")

Bash("D:/MariaDB/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -proot normandie_drupal_d10 -e "SELECT entity_id, SUBSTRING\(field_contenu_value, 1, 500\) FROM paragraph__field_contenu WHERE field_contenu_value LIKE ''%cheque-eco-energie%'' OR field_contenu_value LIKE ''%normandie%'' LIMIT 10;")

Bash("D:/MariaDB/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -proot normandie_drupal_d10 -e "SELECT link__uri, title FROM menu_link_content_data WHERE link__uri LIKE ''%cheque%'' OR link__uri LIKE ''%normandie%'' OR link__uri LIKE ''%http%'';")
